name: badge
description: A small status pill mapping each variant to a token fill + foreground pair: the shadcn taxonomy (default, secondary, destructive, outline, ghost, link) alongside the status family (neutral, success, warning, danger, info). ghost is fill-less foreground text; link is primary text that underlines on hover. Pass href for an asChild <a> link (else an inert <span>). Server-first PARTIAL (ADR-0012, Wave 4): variant-to-colour is pure, so there is no client state and no island. Replaces the <lv-badge> Lit island. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the badge partial to your JTE root at lievit/badge.jte, reached as @template.lievit.badge(variant=..., label="..."). Variant drives the fill + foreground (+ border for outline) tokens across the shadcn names (default/secondary/destructive/outline/ghost/link) and the status names (neutral/success/warning/danger/info); pass label for plain text or a content slot for rich children (content wins); pass href to render the pill as a real <a> link (asChild). The source is yours: edit freely.
